name: 10K FOLLOWERS!!!
description:
10K FOLLOWERS!!!!

Thank you so much for 10,000 followers!!
I just got back from a New Year’s break and saw that I had reached 10,000 followers. I never imagined I’d hit such a high milestone. In the beginning, I was just posting bots here for fun. Honestly, I didn’t even care if people used them or not. But over time, I realized people actually enjoyed my bots, so I kept creating them.

What really changed everything was when I started focusing solely on creating MLM bots. I had always noticed that most bots on this site were targeted toward women, and it bothered me because I wanted to have fun here too. I thought there might be others who felt the same way, and that’s what inspired me to focus exclusively on MLM bots.

At first, I didn’t think it would work because, like it or not, most users on the site are women. But I decided to take the risk anyway—I deleted most of my AnyPOV bots and dedicated myself to creating MLM content. And well... it worked! Many people started visiting my profile and enjoying my bots, which motivated me and pushed me to improve.

If you look at my older bots, you’ll notice my English writing had a lot of mistakes (since English isn’t my first language). But if you compare them to my current bots, you can see how much I’ve improved, all thanks to your support.

It’s still a bit overwhelming and sometimes stressful, especially when women invade this space that’s meant for and bisexual men. On top of that, there are excessively negative comments and unwarranted hate. This happens a lot with my bot “Mike, Sister’s Boyfriend.” I try to avoid reading the reviews for that one because there are so many awful comments.

But regardless, thank you so much for 10,000 followers. I’ve been really busy with college, work, personal issues, and so on, but I promise I’ll try to bring more bots to you all more frequently.

Thank you again, and take care! Love you all! 💖
creator: ShyLoL
